title: Verify 'Cancel Anyway' skips Incentive Offer (when disabled)
description: Test that if the incentive offer is disabled via backend, clicking 'Cancel Anyway' on the Loss Aversion pop-up directly cancels the trial.
preconditions: User is on the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up for cancellation
The incentive offer is disabled in the backend

steps.description: 1. Click the 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' button

expected_result: The trial is immediately cancelled. The Incentive Offer pop-up is NOT shown. The feedback pop-up is displayed.
